hero.description: Cinematic photography and films for weddings and milestone celebrations, with clear pricing, fast delivery, and complete ownership.

services.description: Weddings, baby shoots, corporate events, and more. Wide-ranging coverage with one consistent standard of care.

why.description: Clear pricing, dependable delivery timelines, and straightforward ownership from the start.

features.title: {PHOTO_DELIVERY_DAYS}-Day Photo Delivery
features.desc: Edited photos are delivered in {PHOTO_DELIVERY_DAYS} working days with a clear turnaround promise.

features.title: Copyright Stays With You
features.desc: Copyright stays with you from day one. No watermarks, usage restrictions, or recurring fees.

features.title: Honest, Final Pricing
features.desc: The price you see already includes GST, so you can plan with confidence and avoid last-minute surprises.

features.title: Start Online
features.desc: Build an estimate online, then move to booking when you're ready. We'll guide you from there, usually {RESPONSE_TIME_PROMISE}.

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Event
steps.desc: Share your details through the builder or booking form. We'll respond {RESPONSE_TIME_PROMISE} with clear options and next steps.

steps.title: Plan the Coverage
steps.desc: We help shape the right coverage, timeline, and team for your event.

steps.title: Coverage on the Day
steps.desc: Our team works with a calm presence, backup equipment, and attention to the moments that matter.

steps.title: Gallery in {PHOTO_DELIVERY_DAYS} Days
steps.desc: Edited photos are delivered digitally within {PHOTO_DELIVERY_DAYS} working days, and copyright stays with you.

expectations.title: Fast, clear communication
expectations.text: You hear from us {RESPONSE_TIME_PROMISE} with clear options and an easy next step.

expectations.title: Transparent booking flow
expectations.text: See pricing first, then choose how you want to proceed. No hidden add-ons and no vague package promises.

expectations.title: Clear delivery promises
expectations.text: Edited photos arrive in {PHOTO_DELIVERY_DAYS} working days, with copyright staying with you.

items.q: How quickly will I get my photos?
items.a: Edited photos are delivered within 5 days. Cinematic video arrives within 15 days.

items.q: Do I own the copyright to my photos?
items.a: Yes. 100% copyright belongs to you. All photos and videos are fully yours.

items.q: Are your prices inclusive of GST?
items.a: Yes. All prices shown are final. No hidden charges, no surprise 18% add-on.
Start with pricing, the booking form, or WhatsApp. We usually confirm availability within 2 hours.
Professional photographer(s), all edited photos (digital), highlight reel, backup equipment, and pre-event planning call.

cta.description: Start with pricing or send us a WhatsApp message. We'll help you choose the right coverage with clear next steps.
